properties.Test Case: (Dev) "We need to make sure cleanup is happening properly with books which began uploading or updating but didn't finish. Ensure such new books do not show up in blorg in the meantime."
properties.Steps: - (Dev) "We need to make sure cleanup is happening properly with books which began uploading or updating but didn't finish. Ensure such new books do not show up in blorg in the meantime."

properties.Test Case: Publish a book with no copyright and no title. Both conditions should be detected and publishing is not allowed. Ensure the "click to fix" works and after adding title and copyright, publishing is allowed. Test with a picture-only book.
properties.Steps: Publish a book with no copyright and no title. Both conditions should be detected and publishing is not allowed. Ensure the "click to fix" works and after adding title and copyright, publishing is allowed. Test with a picture-only book.

properties.Test Case: Ensure "background music" only possible if there is background music; test both options with Blorg results. (This test is mostly obsolete until revisited: but ensure that music is automatically uploaded.) (JT 6.3: I no longer see any control for whether to include background music in a web upload. Presuming that's why this is obsolete. No way for it to succeed, so I removed the check box.)
properties.Steps: Ensure "background music" only possible if there is background music; test both options with Blorg results. (This test is mostly obsolete until revisited: but ensure that music is automatically uploaded.) (JT 6.3: I no longer see any control for whether to include background music in a web upload. Presuming that's why this is obsolete. No way for it to succeed, so I removed the check box.)

properties.Test Case: Set monitor scaling to > 100%. Ensure you get a warning to not do that and RECORD button is disabled.
properties.Steps: - Set monitor scaling to > 100%. Ensure you get a warning to not do that and RECORD button is disabled.

properties.Test Case: Record a video with one or two dimensions which exactly match your monitor. Recording window is frameless and can be closed by right-clicking on it.
properties.Steps: Record a video with one or two dimensions which exactly match your monitor. Recording window is frameless and can be closed by right-clicking on it.
